{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 1990
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 1990
|image           =
|image_size       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = June 19 - November 7
|num_teams       = 32
|winners       = [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|second       = [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]
|matches         = 62
|goals           = 119
|scoring_leader = {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Cláudio Tavares Gonçalves|Bizu]] (7)
|award          = 
|prev_season      = [[1989 Copa do Brasil|1989]]
|next_season      = [[1991 Copa do Brasil|1991]]
}}

The '''1990 Copa do Brasil'''  was the second edition of the [[Copa do Brasil]].

The competition started on June 19, 1990, and ended on November 7, 1990, with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio Serra Dourada]] in [[Goiânia]], in which [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]] lifted the trophy for the first time with a 0–0 draw with [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]].

Bizu, of [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]], with seven goals, was the competition's top scorer.

==Format==
The competition featured 32 clubs in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format, where all rounds were played in two legs and the [[away goals rule]] applied.

==Participating teams==
{|border="0" cellpadding="2"
|- valign="top"
|
*[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América (RN)]]
*[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]
*[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]
*[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]
*[[Centro Sportivo Capelense|Capelense (AL)]]
*[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará (CE)]]
*[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba (PR)]]
*[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma (SC)]]
|width="50"|&nbsp;
|valign="top"|
*[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]] 
*[[Desportiva Capixaba|Desportiva (ES)]] 
*[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]
*[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]
*[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]
*[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]
*[[Joinville Esporte Clube|Joinville (SC)]]
*[[Atlético Clube Juventus|Juventus (AC)]]
|width="50"|&nbsp;
|valign="top"|
*[[Mixto Esporte Clube|Mixto (MT)]]
*[[Moto Club de São Luís|Moto Club (MA)]]
*[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico (PE)]]
*[[Operário Futebol Clube (MS)|Operário (MS)]]
*[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]
*[[Atlético Rio Negro Clube|Rio Negro (AM)]]
*[[River Atlético Clube|River (PI)]] 
*[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]
|width="50"|&nbsp;
|valign="top"|
*[[São José Esporte Clube|São José (SP)]]
*[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo (SP)]]
*[[Club Sportivo Sergipe|Sergipe (SE)]] 
*[[Taguatinga Esporte Clube|Taguatinga (DF)]]
*[[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze (PB)]]
*[[União Bandeirante Futebol Clube|União Bandeirante (PR)]]
*[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]
*[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]
|}

==Competition stages==
{{32TeamBracket
| RD1-team01 =[[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze (PB)]]
| RD1-team02 ='''[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score01=0 1
| RD1-score02=0 2 
| RD1-team03 =[[River Atlético Clube|River (PI)]] 
| RD1-team04 ='''[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará (CE)]]'''
| RD1-score03=2 2
| RD1-score04=1 0 
| RD1-team05 =[[Moto Club de São Luís|Moto Club (MA)]] 
| RD1-team06 ='''[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]'''
| RD1-score05=1 1
| RD1-score06=1 1 
| RD1-team07 ='''[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]''' 
| RD1-team08 =[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América (RN)]]
| RD1-score07=3 1
| RD1-score08=1 0 
| RD1-team09 ='''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]''' 
| RD1-team10 =[[Club Sportivo Sergipe|Sergipe (SE)]] 
| RD1-score09=0 1
| RD1-score10=0 1
| RD1-team11 =[[Desportiva Capixaba|Desportiva (ES)]] 
| RD1-team12 ='''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score11=1 1
| RD1-score12=1 2 
| RD1-team13 ='''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]''' 
| RD1-team14 =[[Centro Sportivo Capelense|Capelense (AL)]]
| RD1-score13=5 4
| RD1-score14=1 0 
| RD1-team15 ='''[[Taguatinga Esporte Clube|Taguatinga (DF)]]'''
| RD1-team16 =[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]
| RD1-score15=1 0
| RD1-score16=0 1 
| RD1-team17 ='''[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma (SC)]]''' 
| RD1-team18 =[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]
| RD1-score17=0 2
| RD1-score18=1 0 
| RD1-team19 ='''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba (PR)]]'''
| RD1-team20 =[[São José Esporte Clube|São José (SP)]]
| RD1-score19=1 0
| RD1-score20=2 0 
| RD1-team21 =[[União Bandeirante Futebol Clube|União Bandeirante (PR)]]
| RD1-team22 ='''[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score21=0 0
| RD1-score22=1 2 
| RD1-team23 ='''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]'''
| RD1-team24 =[[Joinville Esporte Clube|Joinville (SC)]]
| RD1-score23=1 3
| RD1-score24=1 1 
| RD1-team25 ='''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]''' 
| RD1-team26 =[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]
| RD1-score25=0 5
| RD1-score26=0 0
| RD1-team27 ='''[[Atlético Rio Negro Clube|Rio Negro (AM)]]''' 
| RD1-team28 =[[Atlético Clube Juventus|Juventus (AC)]]
| RD1-score27=0 1
| RD1-score28=1 0 
| RD1-team29 ='''[[Operário Futebol Clube (MS)|Operário (MS)]]''' 
| RD1-team30 =[[Mixto Esporte Clube|Mixto (MT)]]
| RD1-score29=2 0
| RD1-score30=0 1 
| RD1-team31 =[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]] 
| RD1-team32 =''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]'''
| RD1-score31=0 0
| RD1-score32=0 4 
| RD2-team01 =Náutico (PE)
| RD2-team02 ='''Ceará (CE)'''
| RD2-score01=0 3
| RD2-score02=0 0 
| RD2-team03 =Remo (PA) 
| RD2-team04 ='''Santa Cruz (PE)'''
| RD2-score03=0 1
| RD2-score04=0 0 
| RD2-team05 ='''Bahia (BA)'''
| RD2-team06 =Botafogo (RJ)
| RD2-score05=1 1
| RD2-score06=0 1
| RD2-team07 ='''Flamengo (RJ)''' 
| RD2-team08 =Taguatinga (DF)
| RD2-score07=2 1
| RD2-score08=0 1 
| RD2-team09 =Coritiba (PR) 
| RD2-team10 ='''Criciúma (SC)'''
| RD2-score09=0 0
| RD2-score10=1 0 
| RD2-team11 =Grêmio (RS) 
| RD2-team12 ='''São Paulo (SP)'''
| RD2-score11=1 0
| RD2-score12=1 0 
| RD2-team13 ='''Atlético (MG)''' 
| RD2-team14 =Rio Negro (AM)
| RD2-score13=0 2
| RD2-score14=1 0 
| RD2-team15 =Operário (MS) 
| RD2-team16 ='''Goiás (GO)'''
| RD2-score15=0 0
| RD2-score16=1 5 
| RD3-team01 =Remo (PA)
| RD3-team02 ='''Náutico (PE)'''
| RD3-score01=3 0
| RD3-score02=1 4 
| RD3-team03 =Bahia (BA) 
| RD3-team04 ='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD3-score03=1 0
| RD3-score04=1 1 
| RD3-team05 ='''Criciúma (SC)''' 
| RD3-team06 =São Paulo (SP)
| RD3-score05=2 0
| RD3-score06=0 1 
| RD3-team07 =Atlético (MG)
| RD3-team08 ='''Goiás (GO)'''
| RD3-score07=0 4
| RD3-score08=0 3 
| RD4-team01 ='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD4-team02 = Náutico (PE)
| RD4-score01=3 2
| RD4-score02=0 2 
| RD4-team03 =Criciúma (SC) 
| RD4-team04 ='''Goiás (GO)'''
| RD4-score03=1 0
| RD4-score04=0 1 
| RD5-team01 ='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD5-team02 =Goiás (GO)
| RD5-score01=1 0
| RD5-score02=0 0 
}}

==Finals==
{{football box
|date = November 1, 1990
|time = 19:30
|team1 = [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|score = 1 &ndash; 0
|team2 = [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]
|goals1 = [[Fernando César de Matos|Fernando]] {{goal|61}}
|goals2 =
|report = 
|stadium = [[Estádio Municipal Radialista Mário Helênio|Estádio Mário Helênio]], [[Juiz de Fora]]
|attendance = 2,437
|referee = [[Renato Marsiglia]]
}}
----
{{football box
|date = November 7, 1990
|time = 21:00
|team1 = [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]
|score = 0 &ndash; 0 <br>(0 &ndash; 1 [[Playoff format#Total points series (aggregate)|agg.]])
|team2 = [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|goals1 =
|goals2 = 
|report = 
|stadium = [[Estádio Serra Dourada]], [[Goiânia]]
|attendance = 45,504
|referee = [[Renato Marsiglia]]
}}
<br />
{| width=92% |
|-
|{{Football kit
 | pattern_la =
 | pattern_b  = 
 | pattern_ra =
 | pattern_sh = 
 | leftarm    = 008000
 | body       = 008000
 | rightarm   = 008000
 | shorts     = F2F3F4
 | socks      = 008000
 | title     = Goiás
}}
|{{Football kit
 |pattern_la = _redborderandshoulder
 |pattern_b = _red_hoops_redvneck
 |pattern_ra = _redborderandshoulder
 |leftarm = 000000
 |body = FF0000
 |rightarm = 000000
 |shorts = FFFFFF
 |socks = 000000
 |pattern_so = _hoops_red
 |title = Flamengo
}}
|}
{| width="100%"
|valign="top" width="50%"|
{| style="font-size: 90%" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" align=center
|colspan="4"|''' '''
|-
!width=25| !!width=25|
|-
|GK ||'''1''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Eduardo Heuser]]
|-
|RB ||'''2'''||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Wilson Pereira Carvalho|Wilson Goiano]] || || {{suboff|73}}
|-
|CB ||'''3''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} Richard
|-
|CB ||'''4'''||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Jorge Batata]] || {{yel}}
|-
|LB ||'''6''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} Dalton
|-
|DM ||'''5'''||{{flagicon|BRA}} Wallace
|-
|MF ||'''8''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} Fagundes ([[Captain (association football)|c]])
|-
|AM ||'''11'''||{{flagicon|BRA}} Josué || || {{suboff|45}}
|-
|AM ||'''10'''||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Luvanor Donizete Borges|Luvanor]]
|-
|CF ||'''9''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Túlio Costa|Túlio]]
|-
|FW ||'''7'''||{{flagicon|BRA}} Niltinho
|-
|colspan=3|'''Substitutes:'''
|-
|RB ||'''14'''||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Rubens Carlos]] || || {{subon|73}}
|-
|FW ||'''16'''||{{flagicon|BRA}} Agnaldo || || {{subon|45}}
|-
|colspan=3|'''Manager:'''
|-
|colspan=4|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Sebastião Lapola]]
|}
|valign="top" width="50%"|
{| style="font-size:90%" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" align=center
|colspan="4"|''' '''
|-
!width=25| !!width=25|
|-
|GK ||'''1''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[José Carlos da Costa Araújo|Zé Carlos]]
|-
|RB ||'''2''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Ailton dos Santos Ferraz|Ailton]] || {{yel}}
|-
|CB ||'''3''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Vitor Hugo Siqueira|Vitor Hugo]]
|-
|CB ||'''6''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Rogério Lourenço|Rogério]]
|-
|LB ||'''4''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} Piá
|-
|DM ||'''8''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Uidemar]]
|-
|MF ||'''5''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Leovegildo Lins da Gama Júnior|Júnior]]
|-
|MF ||'''10''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Bobô (footballer born 1962)|Bobô]] || || {{suboff|80}}
|-
|FW ||'''7''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Renato Gaúcho]] ([[Captain (association football)|c]]) || {{yel}}
|-
|CF ||'''9''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Gaúcho (footballer, born 1964)|Gaúcho]] || {{yel}} || {{suboff|73}}
|-
|FW ||'''11''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Zinho]] || {{yel}}
|-
|colspan=3|'''Substitutes:'''
|-
|MF ||'''14''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Marcos Corrêa dos Santos|Marquinhos]] || || {{subon|73}}
|-
|AM ||'''16''' ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Nélio da Silva Melo|Nélio]] || || {{subon|80}}
|-
|colspan=3|'''Manager:'''
|-
|colspan=4|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Jair Pereira (Brazilian footballer)|Jair Pereira]]
|}
|}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />1990 Winners
|-
|[[File:Bandeira do estado do Rio de Janeiro.svg|100px|Rio de Janeiro]]<br>'''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''<br/>'''First Title'''
|}

==References==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20071012234642/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr1990.htm Copa do Brasil 1990 at RSSSF]
{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{Use mdy dates|date=February 2012}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 1990}}
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|1990]]
[[Category:1990 in Brazilian football]]
[[Category:1990 in domestic association football cups]]
